## 📝 Description

Provide a summary of the changes and the problem solved. Reference any associated issues.

## 🛠️ Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## 🧪 Quality Checklist

- [ ] Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify type safety has been maintained.
- [ ] Run `npm run lint` or `eslint` to verify code format styles.
- [ ] Verify accessibility keyboard navigation and dark theme display.
- [ ] Verify there are no exposed secrets or unused debug logs.
